main.c(3) Library Functions Manual main.c(3)

NAME

main.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int main (int argc, char *argv[])

Function Documentation

int main (int argc, char * argv[])

Definition at line 8 of file strings/main.c.

8                                  {
9   long long count = 1;
10   static struct option long_options[] = {
11     {"count", required_argument, 0, 'n'},
12     {"help", no_argument, 0, 'h'},
13     {0, 0, 0, 0}
14   };
15 
16   int opt;
17   while ((opt = getopt_long(argc, argv, "n:h", long_options, NULL)) != -1) {
18     switch (opt) {
19       case 'n':
20         count = strtoll(optarg, NULL, 10);
21         break;
22       case 'h':
23         printf("Usage: ascii-chat-strings [-n|--count COUNT]\n");
24         printf("Generate memorable session strings (adjective-noun-noun format)\n");
25         printf("\nOptions:\n");
26         printf("  -n, --count COUNT   Generate COUNT session strings (default: 1)\n");
27         printf("  -h, --help          Show this help message\n");
28         return 0;
29       default:
30         return ERROR_USAGE;
31     }
32   }
33 
34   if (count <= 0 || (long long)count > ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS) {
35     return ERROR_USAGE;
36   }
37 
38   // Initialize session string system
39   asciichat_error_t err = acds_string_init();
40   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
41     return err;
42   }
43 
44   // Generate session strings
45   for (long long i = 0; i < count; i++) {
46     char session_string[SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE];
47     err = acds_string_generate(session_string, sizeof(session_string));
48     if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
49       acds_strings_destroy();
50       return err;
51     }
52     printf("%s\n", session_string);
53   }
54 
55   acds_strings_destroy();
56   return 0;
57 }




References acds_string_generate(),
    acds_string_init(), and acds_strings_destroy().
